judge_thought:
Explanation:
The table spans matches across two calendar years (2013 and into March 2014) and mixes different competitions (friendlies “f” and Gold Cup “gc”) without defining what constitutes “this season.” Since there is no explicit season boundary or season label, the last game of “this season” cannot be unambiguously identified from the provided data. Therefore, returning “null” appropriately reflects that the opponent for the last game of the referenced season is not determinable from the table.
